block.text: The lift shoots quickly upward. The force of its acceleration almost knocks you down — and it continues for a long time! Suddenly the lift doors pop open. You are in the lobby Of the Robot Experimental Centre. If you cross the square and re-enter your robot, turn to 206. If you investigate the Robot Experimental Centre, turn to 25.

choice.text: If you cross the square and re-enter your robot.
. If you investigate the Robot Experimental Centre.
